prompts: /plan "in the apps/plugin project, in the tempalts section, actually have a blank template, and set that as the default.

/plan "in the apps/plugin project, in the account settings and in the 'ai ad configuration' to Anonymize Photos, also include a limit on the amount of photos to anonymize. Additionally, we need a section to [Test AI Image] and AI Image Instructions collapseable panel just like the System Prompt, to include the instruction for Google Nano Banana API to use. Also the image to send with the instructions as a reference. use a grid view of the images we got from enriching the listing, and a checkbox to select which image to use. By default have the first image selected."

here is the default image prompt to anonymize the listing photo: Create a photorealistic image of a building appropriate for a real estate listing based on the provided image. The home needs to be similar but not the same. Adjust the colors of the garage and or doors, and or roof and or home. Adjust the sytle of windows and or roof type and or roofline or the garage. You can adjust the driveway type (concrete, ashpalt, interlocking brick, somethiing else). Ensure we have serveral changes. to not make it a carbon copy of the origina building. If there are multiple homes only use the primary home in the photo, zoom in or out an necessary. Upscale if needed. The season should be summer. Have the entire home in frame. Adjust the horizontal angle of the photo slightly. Keep the same number of floors. Do not change the type of building. IF there is a yard THEN we need to also adjst the landscaping with more or less trees in different locations. IF this is a single family home AND there are adjacent single family homes in the image THEN we also need to adjst the adjacent single family homes. IF this is an attached home or a carriage home then do not structually change this to make it a single family home. If it is a photo of an apartment building THEN keep it an apartment building. Remove any image water marks.
